title: Fire Sparrow Clan Ancestor
content:
Fire Sparrow Clan Ancestor
 is the proxy-ruler of the 
Fire Sparrow Clan
 for the 
Third Generation Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor
.

History
[
]

He kidnapped 
Liu Jinbiao
 from the 
Fallen Land
 after 
Wang Lin
 planted some of his own Vermillion Bird blood inside him. This led him to falsely believe Liu Jinbiao to the be the 
Sixth Generation Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor
.

He handed Liu Jinbiao over to the Third Generation Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor who is one of the 
Sovereign
's clones. This allowed Wang Lin to infiltrate the Fire Sparrow Clan. He teleported there through his connection to Liu Jinbiao and severely wounded the Sovereign's clones by using the Vermillion Bird feather given to him by the Vermillion Bird Ancestor and the Realm Burning Umbrella spell passed down to him by the 
Second Generation Vermillion Bird Divine Emperor
.

Afterwards, the Fire Sparrow Clan Ancestor took part in the war against the 
Sealed Realm
. After 
Master Hong Shan
 appeared, saved Wang Lin, and severely wounded 
Esteemed Nan Zhao
, the Fire Sparrow Clan Ancestor along with 
Master Enlighten East
, two other 
Nirvana Void
 cultivators and, even, Esteemed Nan Zhao attacked him together.

For some time Master Hong Shan managed to stall the five until he fell in 
Grandmaster Yun Luo
's trap and was sneak-attacked by the Sixth Concubine. Furthermore, one of the 
Five Masters
 appeared to continue holding him back. This allowed the Fire Sparrow Clan Ancestor to leave and confront Wang Lin who was rushing to kill Grandmaster Yun Luo. However, the former was easily sliced in half by the 
Heaven-Splitting Axe
 in Wang Lin's possession.

↑

Chapter 1525
